## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the desired behavior.

## Alternatives considered

What did you try or consider instead?

## Scope

- [ ] Core runtime / broker
- [ ] Policy / JIT
- [ ] Delegates / capability bridge
- [ ] Network / browser proxy
- [ ] Documentation / examples
- [ ] Test suite / fixtures

Any constraints, examples, or prior art.
